sql_array: CREATE TABLE xml_test (id INT PRIMARY KEY, uri VARCHAR(255), content XML);
INSERT INTO xml_test (id, uri, content) VALUES (1, 'virt://documents/doc1.xml', '<root><element>Test</element></root>');
INSERT INTO xml_test (id, uri, content) VALUES (2, 'http://example.com/xml/doc2.xml', '<root><element>Example</element></root>');
SELECT id, xml_uri_get(uri, 'content.xml') AS resolved_content FROM xml_test WHERE isLiteral(resolved_content);
SELECT x.id, x.content FROM xml_test x WHERE x.content IS NOT NULL AND isLiteral(x.content);
SELECT id, xml_uri_get(uri, (SELECT uri FROM xml_test WHERE id = 2)) AS nested_resolved_content FROM xml_test WHERE isLiteral(nested_resolved_content);
SELECT id, xml_uri_get(uri, '') AS empty_uri_content FROM xml_test WHERE isLiteral(empty_uri_content);
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM xml_test GROUP BY xml_uri_get(uri, 'ref.xml') HAVING isLiteral(xml_uri_get(uri, 'ref.xml'));
SELECT DISTINCT id FROM xml_test WHERE isLiteral(xml_uri_get(uri, CONCAT('virtual_', uri)));
ALTER TABLE xml_test ADD COLUMN uri_relative VARCHAR(255);
INSERT INTO xml_test (id, uri_relative, content) VALUES (3, 'virt://documents/doc3.xml', '<root><element>New</element></root>');
SELECT xml_uri_get(CONCAT('virt://', uri_relative), 'inner.xml') FROM xml_test WHERE isLiteral(content) AND content IS NOT NULL;
